title: diphasiastrum alpinum
intro: Diphasiastrum alpinum, also known as Alpine forked polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern that grows on trees and rocks in mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum alpinum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of Diphasiastrum alpinum can be made by drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using it in combination with other herbs to create a tincture or decoction.
